news.text: United CEO had been considering a merger last fall, months before bringing it up to the Trump administration
Nearly 60% of U.S. farmers say their finances are getting worse as fertilizer, fuel costs rise: Survey
Bank of America is set to report earnings. Here's what to expect
Walmart is refreshing the look of Great Value, its largest private label brand
Dollar nears six-week lows as hopes of Iran talks erase war premium - Reuters
Exclusive: India makes it easier for firms to cut IPO size after Iran war hits sentiment, email shows - Reuters

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Futures are ripping higher with SPY up 1.22% to $694.46 as Iran war premium evaporates amid diplomatic talks. Tech leading the charge with QQQ gaining 1.82%, while energy gets crushed down 2% as crude collapses. VIX dropping to 29.22 signals risk-on rotation accelerating.

◆ What to Watch

  • Bank of America Earnings - Major financials report could set tone for sector with XLF lagging at only +0.23%
  • Fed Barr Speech (12:30 ET) - Any hawkish pivot commentary will matter for rate-sensitive sectors
  • MBA Mortgage Data (11:00 ET) - Housing market health check with multiple mortgage metrics dropping
  • Export Price Data (12:30 ET) - Inflation signals as dollar hits six-week lows

◆ Sector Rotation

Classic risk-on trade playing out with Consumer Discretionary (+2.21%) and Tech (+1.60%) leading while defensive Energy crashes. Luxury stocks getting hammered overseas but Consumer Discretionary strength suggests domestic demand resilient. Materials weakness (-0.34%) confirms commodity rotation out of war hedges.
✦ Bull Case
Iran diplomatic progress removes geopolitical risk premium, unlocking trapped liquidity into growth sectors. Dollar weakness helps exports and multinational earnings.
⚠ Bear Case
VIX still elevated at 29+ suggests underlying fragility. Energy sector collapse could signal broader commodity deflation concerns hitting materials and industrials next.
⚡ Key Driver
United Airlines merger speculation with Trump administration involvement could trigger broader airline/transport consolidation plays.

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY $695 - Key psychological resistance, break opens path to $710
  • QQQ $630 - Clean breakout level for tech momentum continuation
  • XLE $85 - Energy support zone, break triggers broader commodity selloff
  • VIX 28 - Sub-28 confirms risk-on sentiment, watch for rapid compression

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
